title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 5–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Yamato, Unknown person #7, Zoro, Unknown person #8 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Imperial Dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, wait!! We didn't mean-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FIRE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AYAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The castle was already burning up enough as it was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's no way to treat your men. You'd be better off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Focusing on me than throwing a tantrum.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the government is that interested in your kind, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Wanna tell me about your race?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why should I bother?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You'll be Dead Soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't have much time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we keep dragging things out, this sword will kill me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I feel close to my limit too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His race being special... doesn't change anything for 'me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're in the same boat then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you've had your time on top!! Now you've got to make room for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: King of Hell... Three- Sword style...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't get ahead of yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaido-San is going to be the next pirate King!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you're a lunarian... the government will never let you go.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw their experiments to test your endurance.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: I'm leaving this place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to form my own pirate crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, how 'bout it? Are you in, guinea pig?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you really think...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You'll be able to change the world?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm the only one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...who can!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The test subjects have escaped!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Your name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Arber.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have the power worthy of a stronger name... call yourself "King"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stand by me and I'll never sell you out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: From today onwards, you're my right-hand man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WORO- RORO- RO!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
